items.title: Trump Was Flattering, Xi Was Resolute. The Difference Spoke Volumes.
items.summary: In contrast to his rhetoric about China at home, President Trump spoke in conciliatory terms with Xi Jinping, the Chinese leader.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.
